hero.headline: Reliable deployments for the software your organization depends on.
hero.subtext: I help small organizations deploy, document, and maintain reliable applications and infrastructure in the cloud or on their own hardware.
hero.proof: Production deployments, CI/CD, backups, and documentation across real-world projects.

trust.framing: Comfortable in managed cloud and self-hosted environments

services.docNote: All work includes documentation and handoff, so your team can understand and maintain what I build.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who you'd be working with.
about.bio: I'm Talon Dunbar, a Computer Science graduate from Dawson College based in Montréal, Québec. I focus on the work that keeps software running: deployments, infrastructure, and the documentation that makes systems maintainable. I work with small organizations in English and French.
about.credBody: I don't recommend tools based on hype. I research the options, test promising ones in my own homelab, and recommend what actually works for your needs.
about.githubLink: See what I've starred on GitHub

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions clients usually ask.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Tell me what you're trying to solve. I'll ask a few questions, and if we're a fit, I'll recommend the best next step, usually an audit.
